raise_justifications.desktop/macos/Desktop/Sources/ProactiveA: Task candidate context now carries only backend action-item IDs, while local SQLite/staged evidence remains id-less so the model cannot target it for a backend mutation.
stopMonitoring now clears capture-recovery/background-polling state and timers, plus a pure ProactiveCapturePolicy gate, so a stop mid-recovery cannot silently disable capture on the next start.
